title: Symposium on Global Research Collaboration of SAARC Nations in AI and Data Science
content: Symposium on Global Research Collaboration of SAARC Nations in AI and Data Science November 29, 2025 | Jaypee University of Information Technology, Solan, HP Register Now Learn More Symposium Highlights Panel Discussion Collaborative Research Beyond Borders - Experiences of International Scholars Networking Meet Connect with peers, mentors, and research labs for future collaboration Spotlight Talks Short talks by young innovators working in AI, Data Science, and related fields Participation Certificate All registered international participants will receive a certificate Symposium Objectives Encourage international student participation and cross-border academic exchange Showcase student-led innovations and research projects in imaging, AI, and computer vision Discuss challenges and opportunities in pursuing global research careers Establish research and internship collaborations between Indian and SAARC Nations universities Symposium Countdown 00 Days 00 Hours 00 Minutes 00 Seconds Register Now
